Description: Verify admin can edit existing book information
Preconditions: Admin is logged in; a book exists in the database
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Open Admin Dashboard 3. Click Edit on an existing book 4. Modify the title 5. Save changes
Test Data: bookId: existing book, New Title: Clean Code (2nd Edition)
Expected Output: Book details updated; changes reflected in book list and user-facing pages
Actual Output: Book details were updated successfully; the changes appeared in both the admin book list and the public book catalogue

Description: Verify admin can soft-delete a book from the library
Preconditions: Admin is logged in; book exists and is not already deleted
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Open Admin Dashboard 3. Click Delete on a book 4. Confirm deletion action
Expected Output: Book marked as deleted; no longer visible to regular users; remains in database for recovery
Actual Output: Book was soft-deleted successfully; it was removed from the user-facing catalogue while remaining in the admin database for potential recovery

Description: Verify users can filter the books list by a specific genre
Preconditions: Books with different genres exist in the database; user is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Books page 2. Select Technology from genre filter 3. View filtered results
Expected Output: Only books of Technology genre displayed; other genres hidden
Actual Output: Books page filtered correctly displaying only Technology genre books; other genres were excluded from the view

Description: Verify books can be sorted alphabetically by title
Preconditions: Multiple books exist in the database
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Books page 2. Click Sort by Title option 3. View sorted book list
Expected Output: Books listed in alphabetical order by title from A to Z
Actual Output: Books were sorted and displayed in correct alphabetical order by title from A to Z

Description: Verify clicking on a book card opens its detailed information page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Books page 2. Click on a book card 3. View book details page
Expected Output: Book details page shows title; author; description; genre; and functional Read Now button
Actual Output: Book details page loaded correctly showing title; author; full description; genre tag and a functional Read Now button

Description: Verify admin cannot add a book without filling in all required fields
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and on the Add Book page
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Click Add Book 3. Leave title field empty 4. Fill other fields 5. Click Submit
Expected Output: Validation error shown for missing title; book not saved to database
Actual Output: Form displayed a validation error indicating the title field is required; book was not saved to the database

Description: Verify the advanced search bar returns relevant results
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Search page 2. Type a book title in search bar 3. Press Enter or click Search
Expected Output: List of matching books displayed; results filtered by title
Actual Output: Search returned a filtered list of books matching the query Clean Code with correct titles and cover images

Description: Verify search queries are saved to user's search history
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Go to Search Hub 3. Search for Python 4. Go back to Search Hub
Expected Output: Python appears in search history list below search bar
Actual Output: The query Python was saved to search history and appeared in the history section when the user returned to the Search Hub page

Description: Verify user can clear their entire search history
Preconditions: User is logged in; has previous search history entries
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Go to Search Hub 3. Click Clear History button 4. Confirm the action
Test Data: userId: user with existing search history
Expected Output: All search history entries removed; empty state message shown
Actual Output: Search history was cleared completely; an empty state message appeared confirming no search history exists

Description: Verify users can filter search results by author name
Preconditions: Books with author data exist in database; user is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Search page 2. Enter author name in author filter field 3. Apply search
Expected Output: Only books authored by Robert Martin displayed in results
Actual Output: Search results filtered to show only books authored by Robert Martin; other books were excluded from the results
